name: Bombay Rice & Lentils
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion in oil until soft.
2. Add rice and cook, stirring occasionally, for several minutes.
3. In a bowl, combine tomato paste, water, cinnamon, and lentils.
4. Stir the mixture into the rice.
5. Bring to a boil, cover tightly, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in seasoned salt, raisins, and pinenuts.
7. Grease an 8-inch-square baking dish and pour in the rice mixture.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 to 30 minutes.
